daily.today_energy: Your magnetic pull is undeniable rn. The universe is basically handing you the spotlight, so lean into that natural confidence. You're giving main character energy and people can feel it.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your partner's noticing the glow. Single? Someone's definitely watching from across the room. Either way, authenticity is your love language today—no need to perform.
daily.career: This is lowkey your moment to speak up about something you've been sitting on. Your ideas have serious weight behind them. Trust your instincts and let that creative fire guide your next move.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive. Your vibe is about flow, not force. Listen to that.

weekly.overview: This week's energy has you feeling like the main character you are. Venus is vibing with your sector of authentic self-expression, so lean into what makes you uniquely you. Magic happens when you stop dimming your light.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a tender energy asking you to be more vulnerable. Someone might be noticing you more than usual—not because you changed, but because you're showing up more genuinely. That's the real flex.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the time to speak up in meetings or pitch that thing you've been sitting on. People are more receptive to your vision than you think. Trust your instincts on collaboration opportunities.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Whether that's dancing, stretching, or just walking outside, let it be joyful. Energy shifts when you do things because you love yourself, not because you think you have to.
